name: KG Q&A - Complex Cypher Aggregation
description: Validates that the KG Q&A agent formulates complex Cypher aggregation queries to answer analytical questions about the skill graph.

parts.text: Which skills have the most COMPLEMENTS relationships? Show me the top 5 most connected skills.
I ran a Cypher aggregation query on the knowledge graph. Here are the top 5 skills with the most COMPLEMENTS relationships, showing how central they are in the skill ecosystem.

args.cypher_query: MATCH (s:Skill)-[r:COMPLEMENTS]-() RETURN coalesce(s.name, s.id) AS skill, count(r) AS complement_count ORDER BY complement_count DESC LIMIT 5

parts.text: How many skills are in each domain? Give me a breakdown.
Here is the breakdown of skills by domain in the knowledge graph, based on a Cypher aggregation query.

args.cypher_query: MATCH (s:Skill) RETURN s.domain AS domain, count(s) AS skill_count ORDER BY skill_count DESC
